name: config-cli
summary: Discover and describe workspace config files

commands.name: configs
commands.summary: List configs with name, description, and path

args.name: --json
args.summary: Return JSON instead of a table

commands.name: find
commands.summary: Find one config by name and return its metadata

args.name: name
args.summary: Config name or file stem to find

args.name: --json
args.summary: Return JSON instead of a table

commands.name: validate
commands.summary: Validate that every config has a description field

commands.name: native
commands.summary: Forward all remaining arguments to config-cli
